creator: ben@lavery-griffiths.com
text:
go hugo 0.27.1 has now superseded 0.27 (https://github.com/spf13/hugo/releases/tag/v0.27.1).  New diff attached.

Change log:
- Fix escaped HTML Go 1.9 multioutput issue

Tested against amd64/i386 10.3-RELEASE, 11.0-RELEASE, 11.1-RELEASE, and 12.0-CURRENT. Poudriere logs attached, and also found here for a limited time: http://logs.bnix.club/gohugo-0.27.1_2017-09-13/

portlint -AC:
looks fine.

poudriere bulk -tC:
10_3-RELEASE__amd64: success
10_3-RELEASE__i386: success
11_0-RELEASE__amd64: success
11_0-RELEASE__i386: success
11_1-RELEASE__amd64: success
11_1-RELEASE__i386: success
12_0-CURRENT__amd64: success
12_0-CURRENT__i386: success
